source: 除了坚定目标自信、路径自信、能力自信，高校还应当充分发挥三种优势：一是后发优势，通过持续引进海外杰出学术人才，学习借鉴世界一流大学的先进经验，实现学术水平和办学质量的显著提升；二是文化优势，继承中华文明在五千年积淀的智慧内涵，弘扬发展优秀传统文化，以此来凝聚力量、塑造品牌、提升形象；三是制度优势，发挥社会主义国家的制度优越性，强化目标驱动，汇集共识合力，优化资源配置，为学校加速赶超世界先进水平提供可持续的坚实保障。
reference: In addition to insisting on objective confidence, path confidence and ability confidence, universities and colleges shall also give full play to three advantages: the first one is the advantage of backwardness; through the continuous introduction of overseas outstanding academic talents and learning from the advanced experience of world-class universities, significantly improve the academic level and school running quality; the second one is the cultural advantage; inheriting the wisdom of the Chinese civilization accumulated for five thousand years and carrying forward excellent traditional culture, unify strength, build brand and improve image; the third one is system advantage; give play to the institutional advantages of socialist countries, strengthen objective driving, collect consensus and joining forces, optimize resource configuration, and provide sustainable and solid support for the university to speed up catching up with and surpassing the world advanced level.
target: In addition to firm goal self-confidence, path self-confidence and ability self-confidence, colleges and universities should also give full play to three advantages: First, the advantage of <v>backwardness</v>, by continuously introducing overseas outstanding academic talents and learning from the advanced experience of world-class universities, the academic level and school quality can be significantly improved; The second is cultural advantage, inheriting the wisdom connotation accumulated by Chinese civilization in 5,000 years, and carrying forward and developing excellent traditional culture, so as to gather strength, shape brand and enhance image; Third, institutional advantages, giving full play to the institutional advantages of socialist countries, strengthening goal-driven, pooling consensus, optimizing resource allocation, and providing a sustainable and solid guarantee for schools to accelerate catching up with the world advanced level.

source: 除了坚定目标自信、路径自信、能力自信，高校还应当充分发挥三种优势：一是后发优势，通过持续引进海外杰出学术人才，学习借鉴世界一流大学的先进经验，实现学术水平和办学质量的显著提升；二是文化优势，继承中华文明在五千年积淀的智慧内涵，弘扬发展优秀传统文化，以此来凝聚力量、塑造品牌、提升形象；三是制度优势，发挥社会主义国家的制度优越性，强化目标驱动，汇集共识合力，优化资源配置，为学校加速赶超世界先进水平提供可持续的坚实保障。
reference: In addition to insisting on objective confidence, path confidence and ability confidence, universities and colleges shall also give full play to three advantages: the first one is the advantage of backwardness; through the continuous introduction of overseas outstanding academic talents and learning from the advanced experience of world-class universities, significantly improve the academic level and school running quality; the second one is the cultural advantage; inheriting the wisdom of the Chinese civilization accumulated for five thousand years and carrying forward excellent traditional culture, unify strength, build brand and improve image; the third one is system advantage; give play to the institutional advantages of socialist countries, strengthen objective driving, collect consensus and joining forces, optimize resource configuration, and provide sustainable and solid support for the university to speed up catching up with and surpassing the world advanced level.
target: In addition to firm goal self-confidence, self-confidence in path, and self-confidence in ability, colleges and universities should also give full play to three advantages: first, latecomer advantages, through the continuous introduction of outstanding overseas academic talents, learning and drawing on the advanced experience of world-class universities, to achieve significant improvement in academic level and quality of running schools; second, cultural advantages, inheriting the wisdom connotation accumulated by Chinese civilization in 5,000 years, and promoting and developing excellent traditional culture, so as to unite strength<v>.</v> Shaping the brand and enhancing the image; the third is to give full play to the institutional superiority of socialist countries, strengthen goal-driven, gather consensus and joint efforts, optimize resource allocation, and provide a sustainable and solid guarantee for schools to accelerate catching up with the world's advanced level.
